props.title: swarm-fund-mvp Just Made Aeon a Trading Signal

props.text: swarm-fund-mvp wired Aeon as a live data source this week — ADR-093 (commit dc1846e) ships a 15-min polling adapter against tomscaria/aeon's outputs/{skill}/{date}.json, and 30 of 38 net-new agents this week are aeon-narrative variants (79% of new fleet capacity).
